text:
was the mother of Fay and Grisha Jaeger, the wife of Jaeger, and the grandmother of Zeke Jaeger and Eren Jaeger. She was also the guardian of Zeke after her son was arrested by the authorities.

Appearance

Grisha's mother wore a tired expression on her face with light wrinkles under her eyes and around her mouth. She had unkempt, black hair and dark-colored eyes. She wore a light button-up and an apron around her waist when around the house.

Personality

She was a serious woman who appeared to be very worried for her children, and fearful of the consequences of their misbehavior. Upon hearing about Fay's death, she was said to be in a traumatized state - she was overwhelmed by sorrow to the point where she cried profusely and could not speak a word.

History

Grisha's mother was seen warning her children to be careful and reminding them to wear their armbands as they leave their house. Along with her husband, she was confronted by an officer who explained Fay's death to them. Grisha's mother was said to be lost in her own grief after her daughter died.

Tragedy struck again in the year 832 when Grisha was arrested by the Marley Public Security. During the arrest, she is seen crying by her husband's side. After her son was arrested, Grisha's mother and her husband raised their young grandson Zeke who went on to become a high ranking soldier and Warrior.

Story

Marley arc

In the year 854, over two decades after the arrest of their son, Grisha's now elderly parents lovingly welcome home Zeke, who returns to Liberio after the conclusion of the Marley Mid-East War.

Following Zeke's defection to Paradis, she and her husband are both imprisoned by Marley authorities.

War for Paradis arc

When Eren arrives at Marley's mainland with an army of Colossal Titans, the couple's captors flee for their lives, leaving the two trapped and unable to escape the Rumbling.
